name: @neus/network
description: NEUS makes trust portable across the internet — so people, apps, and AI agents can prove what is real before access, payout, or execution.

scripts.docs:dev: cd docs && npx --yes cross-env NODE_OPTIONS=--max-old-space-size=8192 npx --yes mint@4.2.108 dev
scripts.docs:validate: npm run docs:lint:markdown && npm run docs:lint:openapi
